data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-22T21:51 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.thinking:
Deacon checking in. I need to follow the startup protocol:
1. Announce
2. Check the hooked work (already provided in the system message)
3. Execute immediately

The hook shows: `skogtown-wisp-wisp-0rlgv` - a mol-deacon-patrol epic with all children completed. Let me start by running the heartbeat and checking the current state.
